name: 20 MG Propranolol Tablets IP
about: 20 MG Propranolol Tablets IP are general medicines available in solid tablet form. These tablets are manufactured in India and can be used as per suggestion. The active ingredient, Propranolol, is a beta-blocker that helps with the treatment of high blood pressure, angina, and irregular heartbeats. This medicine works by relaxing blood vessels and slowing down the heart rate, which helps to reduce the workload on the heart. The tablets should be stored in a dry place to maintain their effectiveness. They are commonly prescribed by doctors and can be used in combination with other medications. If you are looking for an effective treatment for high blood pressure or angina, then 20 MG Propranolol Tablets IP can be an excellent choice.

faq.q: What is the active ingredient in 20 MG Propranolol Tablets IP?
faq.a: The active ingredient in 20 MG Propranolol Tablets IP is Propranolol, which is a beta-blocker.

faq.q: What is the dosage form of 20 MG Propranolol Tablets IP?
faq.a: The dosage form of 20 MG Propranolol Tablets IP is solid tablets.

faq.q: What is the recommended dosage of 20 MG Propranolol Tablets IP?
faq.a: The dosage of 20 MG Propranolol Tablets IP should be taken as per the suggestion of your doctor.

faq.q: How should I store 20 MG Propranolol Tablets IP?
faq.a: You should store 20 MG Propranolol Tablets IP in a dry place to maintain their effectiveness.

faq.q: Can 20 MG Propranolol Tablets IP be used with other medications?
faq.a: Yes, 20 MG Propranolol Tablets IP can be used with other medications, but it is recommended to consult your doctor before taking any new medication.
